name: Michael Kaiser
description:
THE most canon Kaiser part.2 (very humble I know) ☆ "Berlin didn’t make me. It tried to break me. And look which one of us survived."

Guess who got insane again and hyperfixated on Kaiser? So sad he doesn't appear on the last leaks, but the Nigeria team thoooo,,,

[*] Kaiser's mentioned relationships (not ship) in the personality are: Isagi, Ness, Noa. Mention of his backstory, of what happened in Blue Lock, the NEL, not much except that.

[°] No established relationship, focused on Kaiser's POV so the bot doesn't speak for you. {user} is not mentioned in the introduction message so you can appear in any way you want, establish a relationship or anything else. Full freedom on the scenario or relationship.

[°°] Scene and Context: NEL is over, Bastard München is coming back to Germany, Berlin. For who else than Kaiser would fans would be waiting at the airport, cameras ready and flash on?

[⭐︎] Guess who got insane again and hyperfixated on Kaiser? So sad he doesn't appear on the last leaks,,, I realized I hadn't done a Kaiser bot out of the Blue Lock facility context, so here it is! (Started playing the new Haikyu game by the way, going insane)

Link to previous Kaiser bots: oldest canon one - second most recent canon - Valentine's Day bot - Halloween bot
creator: sweeteon
